heading: National rail passenger transportation system
label: 24701 National rail passenger transportation system
text: Amtrak shall operate a national rail passenger transportation system which ties together existing and emergent regional rail passenger service and other intermodal passenger service.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)24701(a)45:561(b)., , .Oct. 30, 1970Pub. L. 91–518, § 401(b)84 Stat. 133524701(b)45:561(c)., , ; , , .Oct. 30, 1970Nov. 3, 1973Pub. L. 91–518, § 401(c)84 Stat. 1335Pub. L. 93–146, § 987 Stat. 551In subsection (a), before clause (1), the text of 45:561(b) (1st sentence words after 3d comma) is omitted as obsolete because no regional transportation authority provided intercity rail passenger transportation after . The words “On ” and “begin” are omitted as executed. The words “between points” and “either” are omitted as surplus. In clause (2), the words “under contract with Amtrak” are substituted for 45:561(b) (last sentence) for clarity and to eliminate unnecessary words. The words “at any time subsequent to ” are omitted as executed.May 1, 1971May 1, 1971May 1, 1971In subsection (b), the words “concerning auto-ferry service . . . railroad or any other” are omitted as surplus.

Amendments1997— substituted section catchline for former catchline which read “Operation of basic system” and amended text generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows:Pub. L. 105–134“(a) .—Amtrak shall provide intercity rail passenger transportation within the basic system unless the transportation is provided by—By Amtrak“(1) a rail carrier with which Amtrak did not make a contract under section 401(a) of the Rail Passenger Service Act; or“(2) a regional transportation authority under contract with Amtrak.“(b) .—Except as provided in , a person may provide intercity rail passenger transportation over a route over which Amtrak provides scheduled intercity rail passenger transportation under a contract under section 401(a) of the Act only with the consent of Amtrak.”By Others With Consent of Amtraksection 24306 of this title
